title: Hero background image at 45% opacity, larger logo, remove decorative circle, fix WhatsApp number

requirements.text: In HeroSection.tsx, set the hero section background to use the newly generated background image asset at '/assets/generated/hero-bg.dim_1920x1080.png' rendered at 45% opacity. The background image should cover the full section (object-fit: cover) while all existing text, logo, CTA buttons, and stats remain fully visible and unchanged in appearance.

quotes: background image should be this image in 45% opacity and the logo and all the texts will be same there, they are looking good

acceptanceCriteria: The hero section displays the provided background image behind all content
The background image opacity is 45% (the image appears semi-transparent)
All hero text, logo, and buttons remain fully legible and unaffected by the background opacity
The background image covers the full hero section without stretching or letterboxing

requirements.text: In HeroSection.tsx, increase the logo image size slightly compared to its current dimensions. Keep object-fit: contain and maintain aspect ratio.

quotes: increase the size of the logo a bit

acceptanceCriteria: The logo in the hero section is visibly larger than before
The logo is not cropped or distorted — object-fit: contain is preserved
The logo aspect ratio remains correct

requirements.text: In HeroSection.tsx, locate and remove the large decorative circle element rendered in the center/middle area of the hero section. Remove only that decorative circle; do not alter any other layout elements.

quotes: the big circle in between is not looking very good remove it

acceptanceCriteria: The large decorative circle element no longer appears in the hero section
All other hero section elements (text, logo, buttons, stats) remain unchanged and properly laid out

requirements.text: In ContactSection.tsx, update the WhatsApp CTA button href to use the correct number +916265381119. The link should be formatted as 'https://wa.me/916265381119'. Update any hardcoded phone number references in this button or its surrounding text to reflect +91 6265381119.

quotes: when i tap on the 'chat on whatsapp' button it is showing this number does not exist once again update the number +91 6265381119

acceptanceCriteria: The 'Chat on WhatsApp' button links to 'https://wa.me/916265381119'
Tapping the button opens WhatsApp with the correct number +91 6265381119
No other UI changes are made to the contact section

constraints: Do not modify any text content, typography, or color scheme in the hero section
Do not alter logo references in Navbar.tsx, Footer.tsx, or AboutSection.tsx
nonGoals: Redesigning any section other than the hero background and WhatsApp button
Changing service card colors or layout
Modifying the footer or navbar logo size

required: Digital marketing themed background with abstract data/network lines, glowing nodes, and a dark navy-to-deep-blue gradient atmosphere, suitable for a full-screen hero backdrop (hero-bg.dim_1920x1080.png)
